programme.title: Movie Contd - Aval Peyar Tamilarasi
programme.desc: Thamizharasi, the granddaughter of a puppeteer, and Jothi, the grandson of a rich landlord, develop an affinity for each other. Her life turns upside down when he rapes her in the fear of losing her.

programme.title: Enga Ooru Sippayi
programme.desc: Rasaiyya, an army man, grows up thinking that his father and sister died in an accident. However, when he learns that they both were tortured and killed by a rich landlord, he decides to seek revenge.

programme.title: Enn Thangai
programme.desc: En Thangai is a 1989 Indian Tamil-language film, directed by A. Jagannathan, starring Arjun and Gautami.

programme.title: Pulival
programme.desc: Kasi, an employee of a supermarket, steals an expensive phone containing explicit videos belonging to a rich businessman Karthik. Hell breaks loose when the videos get uploaded onto the Internet.

programme.title: Urimai Unjal Aadukirathu
programme.desc: Shanmugam lives with his wife Vadivu and three children – Uma, Mala and Narayanan. Shanmugam has great respect for his elder brother (Sundarrajan), a widower. A small flashback is shown where Sundarrajan's wife dies during childbirth.

programme.title: Pokkiri raja
programme.desc: Ramesh joins a businessman's factory to eradicate irregularity and corruption, but gets dismissed due to personal reasons. To make matters worse, he is framed for murder when the industrialist dies.

programme.title: Onbadhu Roobai Nottu
programme.desc: An innocent villager and his wife are forced to leave their village when their children demand that the family property be handed over to them.

programme.title: Rajakali Amman
programme.desc: Meena, her brother Gopal and their pet snake, Madan, look after Goddess Durga after she is ousted from her own temple. Her blessings flourish their lives till the day Meena ends up marrying Ramesh.

programme.title: Kaadhal Sadugudu
programme.desc: Chitambaram doesn't want his daughter Kausalya to marry Suresh. Suresh then decides not to marry Kausalya without her father's permission. Finally Chitambaram relents and the lovers reunite.

programme.title: Thalayanai Manthiram
programme.desc: Thalayanai Manthiram is a Tamil Movie,Directed and Produced by N.Venkatesh, starring Pandiyan and Sulakshana in the lead roles, Music by Ilaiyaraaja.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Moodu Mullu
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife. Watch Neelaveni & Tarak's destiny unfold.

programme.title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu

programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering. Yet, her unshaken faith proves the power of devotion, goodness & love.

programme.title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu
programme.desc: A captivating women's show that actively engages its audience through thoughtfully curated activities, fun games, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories. Join us for an enjoyable experience that will leave you feeling connected & uplifted.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Sivangi
programme.desc: Born into a humble and rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Sivangi takes it upon herself to leave home and fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely confront the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sathya
programme.desc: Sathya, who shares a close bond with her sister, values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones. But their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.title: Moodu Mullu
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife. Watch Neelaveni & Tarak's destiny unfold.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Sevanthi

What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Namma Baduku
programme.desc: Movie starring Rajesh, K S Ashwath, Balakrishna and directed by M N Aradhya.

programme.title: Arasina Kunkuma
programme.desc: A married couple strives hard to keep their family happy. However, things take a turn when the husband dies and the wife has to deal with all the responsibilities alone.

programme.title: Aliya Alla Magala Ganda
programme.desc: The Story Revolves around Raja, an orphan, who relocates to a maternal village and falls in love with the daughter of a henchman with whose help he got a job.

programme.title: Bahala Chennagide
programme.desc: Two very good friends have to go through rough circumstances and face challenging situations that test the strength of their friendship.

programme.title: I love you Ninne Preethisuve
programme.desc: Santosh, a carefree youth, parts ways with his lover, Dharmika, during his college days. Years later, he runs into her, which leaves him in splits.

programme.title: Kanchana 2
programme.desc: A cameraman is petrified of ghosts but obliges when his director proposes a show on ghosts to revive their TV channel. However, strange things happen when they start working on the show.

programme.title: Bhuvana Jyothi
programme.desc: A Films Unfolds The Life Story Of Jesus Is Told From His Humble Birth Through His Teachings, Crucifixion And Ultimate Resurrection.

programme.title: SriKrishna at gmail com
programme.desc: Single mother, Malavika's daughter, begins calling a luxury hotel attendant, Sathya, her father. Malavika pays Sathya to play the part and indulge the child. This unusual relationship takes a turn when Malavika & Sathya start falling for each other.

programme.title: Movie -Shivarjuna
programme.desc: Shiva, the son of a village chief, participates in an annual competition against their neighbouring village. However, things go haywire and a blood feud begins between the chiefs of the two villages.

programme.title: Chalisuva Modagalu
programme.desc: Mohan and his wife, Leela, are the leading lawyers. Trouble brews in their marital life and careers when Mohan defends his past lover who murdered her husband.

programme.title: Movie -Govinda Govinda
programme.desc: An aspiring filmmaker Srinivas sets out to rope in actress Padmavathi for his debut movie. Somewhere else, on a school campus, Alamelu seeks the help of her back-bencher friends to stage her abduction. What happens when these two tales collide?

programme.title: Saarathi
programme.desc: Rukmini is forcefully taken hostage by her enemy, Pratap, who wants to marry her. When Raja, her lover and a rickshaw driver by profession, finds out, he sets out for her hometown to rescue her.

programme.title: Ade Kannu
programme.desc: Jaganath is a rich man owning an estate. When his wife, Kamala, gets killed in a car accident, the police suspect that there is some foul play and decide to investigate further.

programme.title: Movie -Hosamane Aliya
programme.desc: An unemployed man puts an advertisement in the paper to find work. However, he gets tricked into doing all the house chores for a cunning young woman who pretends to be the house owner's daughter.

programme.title: Godfather
programme.desc: Ajay blames his father, Shiva, for his mother's poor mental condition. He decides to take revenge on him and tries to ruin the life of his brother, who was raised by Shiva.

programme.title: Kalavidha
programme.desc: Vishwa, a well-known artist, loses his mind after the death of his lover. Kamala, an admirer of his art, decides to help him recover.

programme.title: Movie -BY TWO LOVE
programme.desc: Two opinionated people, Balu & Leela, who detest love, marriage & family, chose to lead an unconventional life and end up as live-in partners with a child. Can they be happy in life without being bound by societal & cultural norms?

programme.title: Muddina Mava
programme.desc: Vijay, a village chairman, marries a poor girl, Lakshmi, against his family's wish. Vijay's brother-in-law is enraged for not marrying his daughter and devises a plan to defame him.

programme.title: Nalla
programme.desc: Preethi, who has a cognitive disability, is kidnapped and forced into prostitution. However, a chance meeting with Prashanth, a teacher, changes her life forever.

programme.title: Betegara
programme.desc: Movie starring Mukhyamantri Chandru, B C Patil, Music Mallu directed by A T Raghu.

programme.title: Manegebandha Mahalakshmi
programme.desc: Movie starring Kalyan Kumar, K S Ashwath, Revathi, Mynavathi and is directed by R Govindaiah.

programme.title: Sri Banashankari Matha
programme.desc: Movie starring Bharath Kalyankumar, Anu Prabhakar, Hamsa Vijeth and directed by Hamsa Vijeth.

programme.title: Manasella Neene
programme.desc: Two close friends, get separated when the girl's father gets transferred to another city. They vow to meet each other at a temple every year, but fate has other plans for them.

programme.title: Kiladigalu
programme.desc: Hari and Krishna's uncle takes advantage of their innocence and tries to murder them for their wealth. A lawyer tries to outsmart him by hiring doppelgangers of Hari and Krishna.

programme.title: Male
programme.desc: After trying hard, Varun, a wealthy young man, succeeds in making Varsha accept his love. However, Varsha has a change of heart when she realises that she cannot match his economic status.

programme.title: Brindavana
programme.desc: Madhu and Bhoomi are the cousins of two stepbrothers, who are arch enemies of each other. When Madhu falls for Krishna, he takes up the responsibility to end her brothers' rivalry.

programme.title: Yashwanth
programme.desc: Yashwanth lives in a railway colony with his family and is famous as a troubleshooter. When he loses the money meant for his mother's operation, he must come up with a plan to earn back the amount.

programme.title: Sogasugara
programme.desc: A girl who has a hearing and speech impairment falls in love with a poor man who is unable to speak. However, their lives turn upside down when her family tries to get her married to a rich man.

programme.title: Devatha Manushya
programme.desc: Krishna, an honest driver, works under a boss who maintains a low profile. His employer sends him to prison when a gold idol is missing.

programme.title: Etharkkum Thunindhavan
programme.desc: Kannabiran, a lawyer, saves a young woman from a pornography racket run by Inba, a minister's son. However, Inba threatens to leak explicit videos of several women, making Kannabiran go after him.

programme.title: Andamaan
programme.desc: Due to a misunderstanding, Monisha and Anand, a happily married couple, decide to get a divorce and fight for their daughter's affection. Soon, Monisha's friend's involvement in their dispute emerges.

programme.title: Hrudaya Hadithu
programme.desc: Prasad, a heart surgeon, fulfils his patient's wish by marrying her as it would save her life. However, her condition worsens when she learns that he has another wife.

programme.title: Kutumba
programme.desc: Brothers Vijay, Vivek and Vidhyadhar love each other and lead a happy life. However, their lives fall apart when one of them is murdered and Vivek is blamed for the crime.

programme.title: Manikantana Mahime
programme.desc: An ardent devotee of Lord Shabarimale Swamy Ayyappa narrates tales of various miracles performed by the Hindu deity where the Almighty tests the devotion of his followers.

programme.title: Prema Parva
programme.desc: Nanjunda, a young man from an affluent family, falls in love with Saraswathi, a poor girl. With time, he decides to go against his father's wishes and marry Saraswathi.

programme.title: Aagodella Olledakke
programme.desc: A man gets married at his grandfather's behest but dislikes his wife. Trouble ensues when his grandfather wishes for a grandson.

programme.title: Sakkath
programme.desc: Blind and aspiring singer Baalu ends up on a reality show while pursuing his lady love Mayuri who is also the show's anchor. His smooth sailing life hits rock bottom when he becomes a courtroom's key witness to cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Pandu Ranga Vittala
programme.desc: Vithala gets married to two women, who are both unaware of each other's existence. He strives hard to keep them happy but encounters various obstacles in his endeavour.

programme.title: Gadibidi Aliya
programme.desc: When an arrogant young woman frames a poor canteen owner and gets him arrested, he decides to teach her a lesson.

programme.title: O Nanna Nalle
programme.desc: A young woman loses her eyesight and has to struggle to get accustomed to her surroundings. In a twist of events, she receives help from a musician that she disliked in the past.

programme.title: Thrimurthi
programme.desc: An inspector, a hippie and an old gardener join hands to take revenge from their long-time enemy.

programme.title: Minugu Thare
programme.desc: Movie starring Shruthi, Kumar Govind, Shweetha and directed by Shivamani.

programme.title: Patela
programme.desc: Patela, an orphan, is adopted by a rich village couple. Years later, he falls in love with a city woman, Madhu, but she walks out on him after learning that he is illiterate.

programme.title: Hosa Belaku
programme.desc: Ravi loves Vatsala, his sister's step-daughter. However, his sister wants him to marry her own daughter, Nagaveni, and fixes Vatsala's marriage to another man against her wish.

programme.title: Yuga Purusha
programme.desc: While on a break, a man hallucinates of vivid imagery from his past life. As he starts remembering things, his girlfriend observes him falling for an older woman.

programme.title: Raam
programme.desc: Pooja's greedy uncles try to forcibly marry her off but Raam mistakenly rescues her from this marriage. When she falls for him and her uncles disapprove of their love, he tries to win their hearts.

programme.title: Mantra Saara
programme.desc: This program features various hymns showcasing several temples and their deities.

programme.desc: A compilation of the most commercially successful songs from recent Kannada movies.

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar, a rich, influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagam”, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekhar’s past misdeed and regain the three ‘Kalachakram’ .

programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.
